text.p: Dear ISIS Users,
ATTN: Departmental Examination Processing Coordinators.
This is to inform you that an update for the ISIS package is now available for downloading. This update takes care of two issues viz:
1. Deactivation of the cancelled 2004/2005 session lest it is used for computation of leading to mass withdrawals.

2. Granting of special waiver to students who were on probation (below 1.00) in 2002/2003 Harmattan semester and who, because they did not have access to their 2002/2003 rain semester results due to crisis went ahead to write the 2003/2004 Harmattan examination achieved a CGPA of 1.00 through that examination.
You do not need to bring your CPU to the Computer Centre. Please follow these steps for a successful downloading and updating:
1. Using My Computer or Windows Explorer go to ISIS folder on your PC and rename the present executable file (one with the icons of 2 students) to ISIS2 or whatever.
2. Go to this URL
(Copy and paste in your browser and press ENTER)
3. Click on the ISIS.EXE link
4. A File Download dialog box will appear. Navigate to your ISIS folder and download the new ISIS executable.
4. Log in to ISIS package and proceed to Semester Initialization as usual.

5. If you have already moved to Harmattan 2005/2006 with the previous version, you will have to select option 2 to initialize the Previous semesters first. Do that successively until you get to Rain 2003/2004. Then select option 1 successively to initialize to Harmattan 2005/2006.
If you however encounter any problem, feel free to contact the following people at the Computer Centre:
1. Mr. X. X. (Rom M24)
2. Mr. X. X.(Room M27)
3. Mr. X. X. (Students' Laboratory)
Thank you.
X. X.
Computer Centre.
If you have already been given the new executable, please ignore this.
